examples: After a hearty breakfast of huevos rancheros, a spicy omelette with chopped vegetables and ham, it was time to head for the marina.
Marina ate only one slice of bread.
Marina was a confident, happy child.
The cause of the explosion at the Oak Grove Marina near Edgewater, Maryland, is unknown.
Her university dissertation was on Marina Tsvetaeva, a poet then in deep official disfavour.
